item.title: International Seminar on Generative AI in Education
item.dc:creator: Ali Hamza
item.description: DataScientia is pleased to announce its participation in the Annual International Scientific and Practical Seminar “Trends and Innovations in Education in the Era of Generative Artificial Intelligence”, hosted by Abai Kazakh National Pedagogical University in Almaty, Kazakhstan. The seminar brings together researchers, …
item.content:encoded:
DataScientia is pleased to announce its participation in the Annual International Scientific and Practical Seminar “Trends and Innovations in Education in the Era of Generative Artificial Intelligence”, hosted by Abai Kazakh National Pedagogical University in Almaty, Kazakhstan.

The seminar brings together researchers, educators, and practitioners to explore the transformative impact of generative AI on education, fostering dialogue on innovation, collaboration, and emerging practices in the field.

As part of the seminar program, Prof. Fausto Giunchiglia, Coordinator of the DataScientia and Professor of Computer Science at the University of Trento, will deliver a talk on The DataScientia Community, introducing the vision, activities, and impact of the DataScientia community, highlighting its role in advancing interdisciplinary data science education and research at a global scale.

About the Seminar

The seminar focuses on:

  • Creation of a communication for studying trends and innovations in education in  the era of generative artificial intelligence;
  • Activating the participation of students, master’s degree students, doctoral students, as well  as young scientists and specialists in research and innovation activities;
  • Presentation of scientific results of the dissertation research of master’s degree students and  doctoral students, innovative ideas and projects of IT communities, and educational organizations;
  • Organization of professional communication of the Seminar participants to study the world experience of scientific collaborations in the field of AI and related areas.
  • Consultation and assistance to the authors of the best scientific presentations at the Seminar for preparing the publication.

Program Highlights

The seminar features an expert session including:

  • Opening remarks by the Faculty of Mathematics, Physics and Computer Science
  • Talks on AI in education, cybersecurity, and IT governance
  • Presentations by international researchers and young scientists
  • Discussions on data-driven decision-making and intelligent educational systems

Date and time: 08 April 2026, 15:00
Venue: г. Алматы, ул. Толе би, 86, ауд. 306
Working language: Kazakh, Russian, English. 

Learn More & Join the Even

  • View the seminar poster
